CREATE TABLE my_schema.my_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT);
COMMENT ON COLUMN my_schema.my_table.name IS 'The name of the person';
COMMENT ON COLUMN my_schema.my_table.name IS NULL;
ALTER TABLE my_schema.my_table ADD COLUMN age INT;
COMMENT ON COLUMN my_schema.my_table.age IS 'The age of the person';
COMMENT ON COLUMN my_schema.my_table.age IS 'This column stores age in years';
CREATE TABLE my_schema.my_view AS SELECT id, name FROM my_schema.my_table;
COMMENT ON COLUMN my_schema.my_view.name IS 'The name extracted from my_table';
ALTER TABLE my_schema.my_table DROP COLUMN age;
COMMENT ON COLUMN my_schema.my_table.id IS 'Unique identifier for each entry';
COMMENT ON COLUMN tmp_table.temp_id IS 'This is a temporary column';
CREATE TABLE my_schema.sub_table (sub_id INT, my_table_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (my_table_id) REFERENCES my_schema.my_table(id));
COMMENT ON COLUMN my_schema.sub_table.sub_id IS 'ID for the sub table';
COMMENT ON COLUMN my_schema.sub_table.my_table_id IS 'Foreign key referencing the main table';
COMMENT ON COLUMN my_schema.sub_table.my_table_id IS NULL;
